text.heading: Invitation to Associates Training conference '07
text.p: Calvary greetings to you in the precious name of the Lord Jesus Christ the hope of our life

We are inviting you to the forthcoming NIFES Associate conference coming up at Ibadan. This conference is to create a forum to discuss the growing trends of Christian faith on campuses and how Christ's disciple can be raised among these students.
Your contribution to these challenges could help to redirect the heart of these students for the better
Please do help us to plan for your welfare package by indicating your interest to attend this conference through a text message to any of the numbers below.
THEME: DISCIPLESHIP: MAKING IMPACT ON CAMPUS.
Venue: S. U conference hall Samonda Ibadan.
